simp only [GEO, norm_div, norm_one, Real.norm_natCast]
  have : Summable (fun n : ℕ ↦ (1 / (n : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℝ)) := by
    have h : (2 : ℝ) = (2 : ℕ) := by norm_num
    simp only [h, rpow_natCast]
    simp only [div_pow, one_pow]
    apply Summable.of_nat_of_sum_le (g := fun n ↦ if n = 0 then 1 else 1 / (n : ℝ) ^ 2)
    · intro n
      split_ifs with h
      · simp
      · positivity
    · intro n
      split_ifs with h
      · simp
      · rfl
    · have := Real.summable_nat_rpow_inv.mpr (by norm_num : (1 : ℝ) < 2)
      convert this.of_norm using 1
      ext n
      simp only [Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg (by positivity : 0 ≤ (n : ℝ) ^ (-(2 : ℝ)))]
      cases n with
      | zero => simp
      | succ n => 
        simp only [Nat.cast_succ, ne_eq, Nat.succ_ne_zero, not_false_eq_true, ↓reduceIte]
        rw [Real.rpow_neg (by positivity), one_div]
        congr 1
        rw [Real.rpow_natCast]
  exact ENNReal.summable

s
  simp only [GEO, norm_eq_abs, ENNReal.toReal_ofNat]
  calc ∑ i ∈ s, |1 / ↑i| ^ (2 : ℝ) 
      ≤ ∑' n : ℕ, |1 / ↑n| ^ (2 : ℝ) := by
        apply sum_le_tsum s (fun _ _ => by positivity)
        apply Summable.abs_of_nonneg (fun _ => by positivity)
        simp only [abs_of_nonneg (by positivity : ∀ n : ℕ, 0 ≤ (1 / n : ℝ) ^ (2 : ℝ))]
        exact Real.summable_nat_rpow_inv.mpr (by norm_num : 1 < (2 : ℝ))
      _ = ∑' n : ℕ, (1 / ↑n) ^ (2 : ℝ) := by
        congr 1
        ext n
        rw [abs_of_nonneg]
        positivity

simp only [GEO]
  have : Summable (fun n : ℕ ↦ ‖(1 : ℝ) / n‖ ^ (2 : ℝ)) := by

    have : (fun n : ℕ ↦ (1 / (n : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℝ)) = (fun n : ℕ ↦ 1 / (n : ℝ) ^ (2 : ℝ)) := by
